data.body:
EXPERIMENT PASS — project Pass-1 criterion + Pass-4 coaching wiring mechanically confirmed.

Timestamp: 2026-07-16T00:50:08Z
Worktree: /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-jira-reb-1003-portability
Branch: experiment/jira-reb-1003-portability
Base SHA: b0ac25447203d864463408c933497f21bc1f8dbf (current origin/main at experiment start)
Production code changes: none; all experiment artifacts are uncommitted.

Exact commands:
1. .venv/bin/python experiments/jira_reb_1003_portability_wiring.py
2. .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/unit/test_criteria_overlay.py::test_mvp_end_to_end_activated_project_criterion_surfaces_finding tests/unit/test_plan_review.py::test_load_move_registry_merges_project_extensions

Temporary project inputs:
- .rebar/criteria_routing.json: project.portability, exec=1-TURN, facet=project-invariants, applies_at.scope=[container,leaf], default_posture=blocking, block_threshold=0.9, activated.
- .rebar/prompts/plan-review-project-portability.md: contract-bearing project criterion prompt.
- .rebar/plan_review_moves.json: project-portability move with applies_when=[project.portability].

Assertions proven by the experiment:
- registry.effective_criteria contains project.portability;
- registry.load_criteria resolves its project prompt;
- route_criteria plus ProductionBatchRunner._project_criteria include it for both leaf and container contexts;
- the real ProductionBatchRunner project fan-in reports [project.portability] and surfaces one injected finding;
- passes.load_move_registry loads project-portability;
- review_kernel.applicable_moves excludes the move for trigger F1 and includes it for trigger project.portability;
- review_kernel.coach deterministically renders: Rework the Gerrit landing workflow so it remains portable across supported rebar client shapes; keep project-specific behavior in project configuration or an explicit extension boundary.
- existing generic project-criterion fan-in and project-move loader tests pass (2 passed in 0.41s).

Structured experiment output summary:
experiment=PASS; routed_scopes={container:true,leaf:true}; project_fan_in=[project.portability]; surfaced_findings=1; move_loaded=project-portability; restricted_to=project.portability.

Implementation decisions confirmed:
- Use the routing values above; Pass 1 discovers, Pass 2 adjudicates, Pass 3 decides.
- Map the counterexample contract to existing P1 fields: location=plan citation; finding=assumption+causal mechanism; scenarios=alternate client shape+observable breakage; evidence=plan quote+grounding facts.
- Keep the coaching move project-specific; do not add a generic core move.
- Put the dogfood documentation in a separate subsection outside the built-in move table parsed by test_move_registry_matches_docs_table.
- The experiment was a prerequisite: a failure would have blocked implementation pending seam repair or plan revision. It passed, so no seam remediation is required.
